setupView.init: const box=root.querySelector('[data-product-image-box]'),fileInput=root.querySelector('[data-product-image-file]'),hidden=root.querySelector('[data-block-field="productImage"]'),preview=root.querySelector('[data-product-image-preview]'),edit=root.querySelector('[data-product-image-edit]');let touched=0;const show=src=>{box?.classList.toggle('has-image',!!src);if(preview)preview.src=src||'';};const setFile=file=>{if(!file)return;if(!/^image\//.test(file.type)){alert('Use an image file.');return;}const reader=new FileReader();reader.onload=()=>{const src=reader.result||'';hidden.value=src;show(src);hidden.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));};reader.readAsDataURL(file);};const pick=e=>{if(e.type==='click'&&Date.now()-touched<600)return;if(e.type==='touchend')touched=Date.now();e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();fileInput?.click();};box?.addEventListener('click',pick);box?.addEventListener('touchend',pick,{passive:false});edit?.addEventListener('click',pick);edit?.addEventListener('touchend',pick,{passive:false});fileInput?.addEventListener('click',e=>e.stopPropagation());fileInput?.addEventListener('change',e=>setFile(e.target.files?.[0]));box?.addEventListener('dragover',e=>{e.preventDefault();box.classList.add('dragover');});box?.addEventListener('dragleave',()=>box.classList.remove('dragover'));box?.addEventListener('drop',e=>{e.preventDefault();box.classList.remove('dragover');setFile(e.dataTransfer.files?.[0]);});show();
setupView.js: const shop = app.findFirstBlockPayload('shop'); if (!shop) { alert('Add a SHOP block first.'); return { stop: true }; } await app.updateBlockPayload(shop.instanceId, next => { next.data = next.data || {}; next.data.products = [...((Array.isArray(next.data.products) && next.data.products) || []), { productName: fields.productName, productPrice: fields.productPrice, productImage: fields.productImage }]; return next; }); app.closeBlockForm(); app.openMainSection('home', document.querySelector('.nav-item[data-target="home"]')); return { stop: true };

setupView.html:
1. Open Stripe API keys with Test mode on.
2. Use the Secret key that starts with sk_test_, not the publishable key (pk_test_).
3. Restricted keys (rk_test_) are only for later if you give them PaymentIntents/charges permissions.
setupView.js: const shop = app.findFirstBlockPayload('shop'); if (!shop) { alert('Add a SHOP block first.'); return { stop: true }; } const paymentType = root.querySelector('input[name="paymentType"]:checked')?.value || 'stripe'; const stripeApiKey = paymentType === 'stripe' ? await encryptSecret(fields.stripeApiKey || '') : null; await app.updateBlockPayload(shop.instanceId, next => { next.data = next.data || {}; next.data.payment = { paymentType, stripeApiKey, bitcoinAddress: paymentType === 'bitcoin' ? fields.bitcoinAddress : '' }; return next; }); app.closeBlockForm(); app.openMainSection('home', document.querySelector('.nav-item[data-target="home"]')); return { stop: true };

adminView.js: root.querySelector('[data-buy]')?.addEventListener('click', () => { const shop = app.findFirstBlockPayload('shop'); const product = Array.isArray(shop?.data?.products) && shop.data.products[0] ? shop.data.products[0] : {}; if (shop) app.mesh?.sendBlockAction?.('store_ops', { type: 'PURCHASE_INTENT', blockInstanceId: shop.instanceId, buyerColor: userColor, data: { storeName: shop.data?.storeName || '', productName: product.productName || '', productPrice: product.productPrice || '', paymentType: data.paymentType || '' } }); if (data.paymentType === 'bitcoin' && data.bitcoinAddress) window.open('bitcoin:' + encodeURIComponent(data.bitcoinAddress), '_blank'); if (data.paymentType === 'stripe' && !data.stripeApiKey) window.open('payment.html', '_blank'); });

peerView.js: root.querySelector('[data-buy]')?.addEventListener('click', () => { const shop = app.findFirstBlockPayload('shop'); const product = Array.isArray(shop?.data?.products) && shop.data.products[0] ? shop.data.products[0] : {}; if (shop) app.mesh?.sendBlockAction?.('store_ops', { type: 'PURCHASE_INTENT', blockInstanceId: shop.instanceId, buyerColor: userColor, data: { storeName: shop.data?.storeName || '', productName: product.productName || '', productPrice: product.productPrice || '', paymentType: data.paymentType || '' } }); if (data.paymentType === 'bitcoin' && data.bitcoinAddress) window.open('bitcoin:' + encodeURIComponent(data.bitcoinAddress), '_blank'); if (data.paymentType === 'stripe' && !data.stripeApiKey) window.open('payment.html', '_blank'); });

setupView.init: const shop = app.findFirstBlockPayload('shop'); const products = Array.isArray(shop?.data?.products) ? shop.data.products : []; const select = root.querySelector('[data-tshirt-product]'); const upload = root.querySelector('[data-tshirt-upload]'); const box = root.querySelector('[data-tshirt-upload-box]'); const fileInput = root.querySelector('[data-tshirt-file]'); const fileName = root.querySelector('[data-tshirt-file-name]'); select.innerHTML = '<option value="">SELECT PRODUCT</option>' + products.map((item, i) => '<option value="' + i + '">' + escapeHtml(item.productName || ('Product ' + (i + 1))) + '</option>').join(''); const show = () => upload?.classList.toggle('open', !!select.value); const setFile = file => { state.tshirtFile = file || null; if (fileName) fileName.textContent = file ? file.name : 'No file selected'; }; let touched = 0; const pick = e => { if (e.type === 'click' && Date.now() - touched < 600) return; if (e.type === 'touchend') touched = Date.now(); e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); fileInput?.click(); }; select.addEventListener('change', show); box?.addEventListener('click', pick); box?.addEventListener('touchend', pick, { passive: false }); fileInput?.addEventListener('click', e => e.stopPropagation()); fileInput?.addEventListener('change', e => setFile(e.target.files?.[0])); box?.addEventListener('dragover', e => { e.preventDefault(); box.classList.add('dragover'); }); box?.addEventListener('dragleave', () => box.classList.remove('dragover')); box?.addEventListener('drop', e => { e.preventDefault(); box.classList.remove('dragover'); setFile(e.dataTransfer.files?.[0]); }); show();
setupView.js: const shop = app.findFirstBlockPayload('shop'); const products = Array.isArray(shop?.data?.products) ? shop.data.products : []; if (fields.productIndex === '') { alert('Choose a product first.'); return { stop: true }; } const index = Number(fields.productIndex); const product = products[index]; if (!product) { alert('Choose a product first.'); return { stop: true }; } return { data: { productIndex: String(index), productName: product.productName || 'Product', printFileName: state.tshirtFile?.name || '', printFileType: state.tshirtFile?.type || '', printfulApiKey: await encryptSecret(fields.printfulApiKey || '') } };

droneState={destroyed:false,raf:0,ro:null};root.__droneGame=droneState;const rng=sfc32(0x9E3779B9,0x243F6A88,0xB7E15162,1337);class Vector{constructor(x,y){this.x=x||0;this.y=y||0;}add(v){this.x+=v.x;this.y+=v.y;return this;}sub(v){this.x-=v.x;this.y-=v.y;return this;}mult(n){this.x*=n;this.y*=n;return this;}div(n){this.x/=n;this.y/=n;return this;}magSq(){return this.x*this.x+this.y*this.y;}mag(){return Math.sqrt(this.magSq());}normalize(){let m=this.mag();if(m>0)this.div(m);return this;}setMag(m){return this.normalize().mult(m);}limit(max){if(this.magSq()>max*max)this.setMag(max);return this;}set(x,y){this.x=x;this.y=y;return this;}copy(){return new Vector(this.x,this.y);}dot(v){return this.x*v.x+this.y*v.y;}}class Particle{constructor(x,y){this.position=new Vector(x,y);this.velocity=new Vector(rng()*.4-.2,rng()*.4-.2);this.acceleration=new Vector(0,0);this.serverPos=new Vector(x,y);this.colliding=false;this.dead=false;this.isDying=false;this.expansion=1;}respawn(x,y){this.position.set(x,y);this.serverPos.set(x,y);this.velocity.set(rng()*.4-.2,rng()*.4-.2);this.acceleration.mult(0);this.dead=false;this.isDying=false;this.expansion=1;}hide(){this.dead=true;this.isDying=false;this.position.set(-9999,-9999);this.serverPos.set(-9999,-9999);}kill(){if(this.dead||this.isDying)return;this.isDying=true;this.velocity.mult(.2);}divert(other){let bounce=new Vector(this.position.x-other.position.x,this.position.y-other.position.y);bounce.normalize().mult(MAX_SPEED);this.applyForce(bounce);}applyForce(force){this.acceleration.add(force);}steerTo(targetX,targetY,factor){let desiredX=targetX-this.position.x,desiredY=targetY-this.position.y,dMag=Math.sqrt(desiredX*desiredX+desiredY*desiredY);if(dMag>0){desiredX=desiredX/dMag*MAX_SPEED;desiredY=desiredY/dMag*MAX_SPEED;}let steerX=desiredX-this.velocity.x,steerY=desiredY-this.velocity.y,steerMagSq=steerX*steerX+steerY*steerY,maxForceSq=(MAX_FORCE*factor)**2;if(steerMagSq>maxForceSq){const mul=MAX_FORCE*factor/Math.sqrt(steerMagSq);steerX*=mul;steerY*=mul;}this.acceleration.x+=steerX;this.acceleration.y+=steerY;}applyBehaviors(particles,target,enemies,fighting,bothActive){if(this.dead||this.isDying)return;let sepX=0,sepY=0,countSep=0,aliX=0,aliY=0,cohX=0,cohY=0,countCoh=0,px=this.position.x,py=this.position.y;for(let i=0;i<particles.length;i++){const dist=Math.sqrt(dSq);if(dSq<SEPARATION_DISTANCE_SQ){sepX+=(dx/dist)/dist;sepY+=(dy/dist)/dist;countSep++;}aliX+=other.velocity.x;aliY+=other.velocity.y;cohX+=other.position.x;cohY+=other.position.y;countCoh++;}}if(fighting&&enemies&&!bothActive){let avoX=0,avoY=0,countAvo=0;for(let i=0;i<enemies.length;i++){const other=enemies[i];if(other.dead||other.isDying)continue;const dx=px-other.position.x,dy=py-other.position.y,dSq=dx*dx+dy*dy;if(dSq>0&&dSq<PERCEPTION_RADIUS_SQ){const dist=Math.sqrt(dSq);avoX+=(dx/dist)/dist;avoY+=(dy/dist)/dist;countAvo++;}}if(countAvo>0){avoX/=countAvo;avoY/=countAvo;const mag=Math.sqrt(avoX*avoX+avoY*avoY);if(mag>0){avoX=avoX/mag*MAX_SPEED;avoY=avoY/mag*MAX_SPEED;}let sX=avoX-this.velocity.x,sY=avoY-this.velocity.y,sMagSq=sX*sX+sY*sY,limSq=(MAX_FORCE*ENEMY_AVOID_FACTOR)**2;if(sMagSq>limSq){const m=MAX_FORCE*ENEMY_AVOID_FACTOR/Math.sqrt(sMagSq);sX*=m;sY*=m;}this.acceleration.x+=sX;this.acceleration.y+=sY;}}if(countSep>0){sepX/=countSep;sepY/=countSep;const mag=Math.sqrt(sepX*sepX+sepY*sepY);if(mag>0){sepX=sepX/mag*MAX_SPEED;sepY=sepY/mag*MAX_SPEED;}let sX=sepX-this.velocity.x,sY=sepY-this.velocity.y,sMagSq=sX*sX+sY*sY,limSq=(MAX_FORCE*SEPARATION_FACTOR)**2;if(sMagSq>limSq){const m=MAX_FORCE*SEPARATION_FACTOR/Math.sqrt(sMagSq);sX*=m;sY*=m;}this.acceleration.x+=sX;this.acceleration.y+=sY;}if(countCoh>0){aliX/=countCoh;aliY/=countCoh;const mag=Math.sqrt(aliX*aliX+aliY*aliY);if(mag>0){aliX=aliX/mag*MAX_SPEED;aliY=aliY/mag*MAX_SPEED;}let sX=aliX-this.velocity.x,sY=aliY-this.velocity.y,sMagSq=sX*sX+sY*sY,limSq=(MAX_FORCE*ALIGNMENT_FACTOR)**2;if(sMagSq>limSq){const m=MAX_FORCE*ALIGNMENT_FACTOR/Math.sqrt(sMagSq);sX*=m;sY*=m;}this.acceleration.x+=sX;this.acceleration.y+=sY;cohX/=countCoh;cohY/=countCoh;let dynamicFactor=COHESION_FACTOR;if(countCoh>15)dynamicFactor*=.7;else if(countCoh<=3)dynamicFactor*=1.3;this.steerTo(cohX,cohY,dynamicFactor);}if(hasInteracted){const dResX=target.x-px,dResY=target.y-py;if(dResX*dResX+dResY*dResY>SEEK_ACTIVATION_SQ)this.steerTo(target.x,target.y,TARGET_SEEK_FACTOR);}else{const margin=50;if(px<margin)this.steerTo(LOGICAL_SIZE/2,py,.5);if(px>LOGICAL_SIZE-margin)this.steerTo(LOGICAL_SIZE/2,py,.5);if(py<margin)this.steerTo(px,LOGICAL_SIZE/2,.5);if(py>LOGICAL_SIZE-margin)this.steerTo(px,LOGICAL_SIZE/2,.5);}}update(){if(this.dead)return;this.velocity.add(this.acceleration);this.velocity.limit(MAX_SPEED);this.position.add(this.velocity);this.acceleration.mult(0);}updateViewer(){if(this.serverPos.x<-5000){if(this.position.x<-5000){this.dead=true;this.isDying=false;return;}if(!this.dead&&!this.isDying)this.kill();return;}if(this.dead||this.isDying){this.dead=false;this.isDying=false;this.expansion=1;this.position.x=this.serverPos.x;this.position.y=this.serverPos.y;this.velocity.set(0,0);return;}const lerpFactor=.2,dx=this.serverPos.x-this.position.x,dy=this.serverPos.y-this.position.y;if(dx*dx+dy*dy>25000){this.position.x=this.serverPos.x;this.position.y=this.serverPos.y;this.velocity.set(0,0);}else{this.position.x+=dx*lerpFactor;this.position.y+=dy*lerpFactor;this.velocity.set(dx*lerpFactor,dy*lerpFactor);this.velocity.limit(MAX_SPEED);}}draw(ctx,color){if(this.dead)return;if(this.isDying){this.expansion+=.2;const size=PARTICLE_SIZE*this.expansion,offset=(size-PARTICLE_SIZE)/2;ctx.fillStyle='#ff0000';ctx.fillRect(this.position.x-offset,this.position.y-offset,size,size);if(this.expansion>=3)this.hide();return;}ctx.fillStyle=this.colliding?'#ff0000':color;ctx.fillRect(this.position.x,this.position.y,PARTICLE_SIZE,PARTICLE_SIZE);}}let displayWidth=1,displayHeight=1,scale=1,particlesHost=[],particlesViewer=[],targetHost={x:LOGICAL_SIZE/2,y:LOGICAL_SIZE/2},targetViewer={x:LOGICAL_SIZE/2,y:LOGICAL_SIZE/2},isFighting=false,peers=0,lastInputTime=0,myInputActive=false,peerInputActive=false,hasInteracted=false,lastTransmissionTime=0,lastPeerSeen=0;function resize(){const rect=game.getBoundingClientRect();displayWidth=Math.max(1,Math.floor(rect.width));displayHeight=Math.max(1,Math.floor(rect.height));canvas.width=displayWidth;canvas.height=displayHeight;scale=Math.min(displayWidth/LOGICAL_SIZE,displayHeight/LOGICAL_SIZE);}function respawnSwarm(){for(const p of particlesHost){const angle=rng()*Math.PI*2,r=Math.sqrt(rng())*(LOGICAL_SIZE/4),x=LOGICAL_SIZE/2+Math.cos(angle)*r,y=LOGICAL_SIZE/2+Math.sin(angle)*r;p.respawn(x,y);}}function initSimulation(){resize();if(particlesHost.length===0){for(let i=0;i<NUM_PARTICLES;i++){const angle=rng()*Math.PI*2,r=Math.sqrt(rng())*(LOGICAL_SIZE/4),x=LOGICAL_SIZE/2+Math.cos(angle)*r,y=LOGICAL_SIZE/2+Math.sin(angle)*r;particlesHost.push(new Particle(x,y));}}if(particlesViewer.length===0){for(let i=0;i<NUM_PARTICLES;i++){const p=new Particle(-9999,-9999);p.hide();particlesViewer.push(p);}}}function countAlive(arr){let c=0;for(let i=0;i<arr.length;i++)if(!arr[i].dead)c++;return c;}function sendDrone(type,extra={}){send({type,blockInstanceId:payload.instanceId,...extra});}function updateStatus(){if(peers===0){fightBtn.style.display='none';enemyStats.style.display='none';isFighting=false;}else if(isFighting){fightBtn.style.display='none';enemyStats.style.display='block';}else{fightBtn.textContent='FIGHT';fightBtn.style.display='block';fightBtn.disabled=false;enemyStats.style.display='none';}}function receiveDrone(namespace,message,pid){if(root.__droneGame!==droneState||namespace!=='drone_ops'||message?.blockInstanceId!==payload.instanceId)return;lastPeerSeen=Date.now();peers=1;if(message.type==='sd'&&Array.isArray(message.payload)){const arr=message.payload;peerInputActive=arr[0]===1;targetViewer.x=LOGICAL_SIZE-arr[1];targetViewer.y=LOGICAL_SIZE-arr[2];let pIndex=0;for(let i=3;i<arr.length;i+=2){if(pIndex<particlesViewer.length){const p=particlesViewer[pIndex],rx=arr[i],ry=arr[i+1];if(rx<-5000){p.serverPos.x=-9999;p.serverPos.y=-9999;}else{p.serverPos.x=LOGICAL_SIZE-rx;p.serverPos.y=LOGICAL_SIZE-ry;}}pIndex++;}}else if(message.type==='fightStart'){isFighting=true;updateStatus();}else if(message.type==='rematch'){respawnSwarm();isFighting=true;updateStatus();}else updateStatus();}app.mesh?.on('block-action',receiveDrone);fightBtn.onclick=()=>{if(peers>0){if(fightBtn.textContent==='REMATCH'){respawnSwarm();isFighting=true;sendDrone('rematch');fightBtn.style.display='none';enemyStats.style.display='block';}else{isFighting=true;sendDrone('fightStart');updateStatus();}}};function updateTargetLocal(clientX,clientY){lastInputTime=Date.now();hasInteracted=true;const rect=canvas.getBoundingClientRect(),offsetX=(displayWidth-LOGICAL_SIZE*scale)/2,offsetY=(displayHeight-LOGICAL_SIZE*scale)/2;targetHost.x=(clientX-rect.left-offsetX)/scale;targetHost.y=(clientY-rect.top-offsetY)/scale;}canvas.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>updateTargetLocal(e.clientX,e.clientY));canvas.addEventListener('touchmove',e=>{e.preventDefault();updateTargetLocal(e.touches[0].clientX,e.touches[0].clientY);},{passive:false});canvas.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{e.preventDefault();updateTargetLocal(e.touches[0].clientX,e.touches[0].clientY);},{passive:false});window.addEventListener('resize',resize);if(window.ResizeObserver){droneState.ro=new ResizeObserver(resize);droneState.ro.observe(game);}function animate(){if(root.__droneGame!==droneState||droneState.destroyed)return;const now=Date.now();myInputActive=now-lastInputTime<500;peers=now-lastPeerSeen<1500?1:0;if(peers===0){peerInputActive=false;if(isFighting)updateStatus();}const bothActive=myInputActive&&peerInputActive,myCount=countAlive(particlesHost),enemyCount=countAlive(particlesViewer);if(isFighting){enemyCountEl.textContent=enemyCount;if(myCount===0||enemyCount===0){fightBtn.textContent='REMATCH';fightBtn.style.display='block';enemyStats.style.display='none';}else{fightBtn.style.display='none';enemyStats.style.display='block';}}else updateStatus();if(now-lastTransmissionTime>66){lastTransmissionTime=now;sendDrone('hb');if(peers>0){const out=[myInputActive?1:0,Math.round(targetHost.x),Math.round(targetHost.y)];for(const p of out.push(-9999,-9999);}sendDrone('sd',{payload:out});}}ctx.fillStyle='#f0f0f0';ctx.fillRect(0,0,displayWidth,displayHeight);ctx.save();const offsetX=(displayWidth-LOGICAL_SIZE*scale)/2,offsetY=(displayHeight-LOGICAL_SIZE*scale)/2;ctx.translate(offsetX,offsetY);ctx.scale(scale,scale);if(hasInteracted){ctx.fillStyle=myInputActive?'#000000':'#888888';ctx.fillRect(targetHost.x-2,targetHost.y-2,4,4);}if(peers>0&&peerInputActive){ctx.fillStyle=isFighting?'#0000ff':'#aaaaaa';ctx.fillRect(targetViewer.x-2,targetViewer.y-2,4,4);}for(const p of particlesHost){p.applyBehaviors(particlesHost,targetHost,isFighting?particlesViewer:null,isFighting,bothActive);p.update();p.colliding=false;}for(const p of particlesViewer){p.updateViewer();p.colliding=false;}if(isFighting){for(let i=0;i<NUM_PARTICLES;i++){const pSelf=particlesHost[i];if(pSelf.dead||pSelf.isDying)continue;for(let j=0;j<NUM_PARTICLES;j++){const pEnemy=particlesViewer[j];if(pEnemy.dead||pEnemy.isDying)continue;const dx=pSelf.position.x-pEnemy.position.x;if(Math.abs(dx)>10)continue;const dy=pSelf.position.y-pEnemy.position.y;if(Math.abs(dy)>10)continue;if(dx*dx+dy*dy<COLLISION_SQ){pSelf.colliding=true;pEnemy.colliding=true;if(!bothActive){pSelf.divert(pEnemy);}else{const v1=pSelf.velocity.copy(),v2=pEnemy.velocity.copy(),v1n=v1.copy().normalize(),v2n=v2.copy().normalize(),dot=v1n.dot(v2n),speedSelfSq=pSelf.velocity.magSq(),speedEnemySq=pEnemy.velocity.magSq();if(dot>.5){if(speedEnemySq>speedSelfSq*4){pSelf.kill();break;}else pSelf.divert(pEnemy);}else if(dot<-.5){if(speedSelfSq<speedEnemySq){pSelf.kill();break;}else if(Math.abs(speedSelfSq-speedEnemySq)<.2){if(speedSelfSq>2){pSelf.kill();break;}else pSelf.divert(pEnemy);}else pSelf.divert(pEnemy);}else{if(speedEnemySq>speedSelfSq){pSelf.kill();break;}else pSelf.divert(pEnemy);}}}}}}for(const p of particlesHost)p.draw(ctx,'#000000');if(peers>0){const enemyColor=isFighting?'#0000ff':'#cccccc';for(const p of particlesViewer)p.draw(ctx,enemyColor);}myCountEl.textContent=myCount;ctx.restore();droneState.raf=requestAnimationFrame(animate);}initSimulation();sendDrone('hb');animate();

if(root.__pdfDocxBlock?.destroy)root.__pdfDocxBlock.destroy();const dropZone=root.querySelector('[data-drop]'),fileInput=root.querySelector('[data-file]'),filePreview=root.querySelector('[data-file-preview]'),statusDiv=root.querySelector('[data-status]'),downloadBtn=root.querySelector('[data-download]'),line=root.closest('.editor-line');if(line){line.style.paddingLeft='0';line.style.borderLeft='0';line.style.minHeight='100vh';}let convertedBlob=null,originalFileName='documento',touched=0;const fmt=n=>n<1024?n+' B':n<1048576?(n/1024).toFixed(1)+' KB':(n/1048576).toFixed(1)+' MB';function showFile(file){if(!filePreview)return;filePreview.classList.toggle('has-file',!!file);filePreview.innerHTML=file?'
PDF
'+escapeHtml(file.name)+'
'+escapeHtml(fmt(file.size))+'
':'No PDF selected';}function showStatus(text,type){statusDiv.textContent=text;statusDiv.className='pdf-docx-status '+(type||'');}function loadScript(src,test){if(test())return Promise.resolve();return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const existing=Array.from(document.scripts).find(script=>script.src===src);if(existing){existing.addEventListener('load',resolve,{once:true});existing.addEventListener('error',reject,{once:true});if(test())resolve();return;}const script=document.createElement('script');script.src=src;script.onload=resolve;script.onerror=()=>reject(new Error('Could not load '+src));document.head.appendChild(script);});}const libs=window.__pdfDocxLibs||(window.__pdfDocxLibs=Promise.all([loadScript('https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/3.11.174/pdf.min.js',()=>!!window.pdfjsLib),loadScript('https://unpkg.com/docx@7.1.0/build/index.js',()=>!!window.docx),loadScript('https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/FileSaver.js/2.0.5/FileSaver.min.js',()=>!!window.saveAs)]).then(()=>{pdfjsLib.GlobalWorkerOptions.workerSrc='https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/3.11.174/pdf.worker.min.js';}));async function handleFile(file){if(!file||file.type!=='application/pdf'){showStatus('Error: please select a PDF file.','error');return;}showFile(file);originalFileName=file.name.replace(/\.pdf$/i,'')||'documento';convertedBlob=null;downloadBtn.style.display='none';showStatus('Loading conversion libraries...','loading');try{await libs;showStatus('Reading PDF and converting...','loading');const arrayBuffer=await file.arrayBuffer();const pdf=await pdfjsLib.getDocument({data:arrayBuffer}).promise;const docChildren=[];for(let i=1;i<=pdf.numPages;i++){showStatus('Processing page '+i+' of '+pdf.numPages+'...','loading');const page=await pdf.getPage(i);const textContent=await page.getTextContent();textContent.items.map(item=>item.str).forEach(text=>{if(text.trim()!=='')docChildren.push(new docx.Paragraph({children:[new docx.TextRun(text)],spacing:{after:120}}));});if(i{if(e.type==='click'&&Date.now()-touched<600)return;if(e.type==='touchend')touched=Date.now();e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();fileInput.click();},onDragOver=e=>{e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();dropZone.classList.add('dragover');},onDragLeave=e=>{e.stopPropagation();dropZone.classList.remove('dragover');},onDrop=e=>{e.preventDefault();e.stopPropagation();dropZone.classList.remove('dragover');if(e.dataTransfer.files.length>0)handleFile(e.dataTransfer.files[0]);},onChange=e=>{if(e.target.files.length>0)handleFile(e.target.files[0]);},onDownload=e=>{e.stopPropagation();if(!convertedBlob)return;if(window.saveAs)saveAs(convertedBlob,originalFileName+'.docx');else{const url=URL.createObjectURL(convertedBlob),a=document.createElement('a');a.href=url;a.download=originalFileName+'.docx';a.click();setTimeout(()=>URL.revokeObjectURL(url),5000);}};dropZone.addEventListener('click',onPick);dropZone.addEventListener('touchend',onPick,{passive:false});dropZone.addEventListener('dragover',onDragOver);dropZone.addEventListener('dragleave',onDragLeave);dropZone.addEventListener('drop',onDrop);fileInput.addEventListener('click',e=>e.stopPropagation());fileInput.addEventListener('change',onChange);downloadBtn.addEventListener('click',onDownload);showFile();root.__pdfDocxBlock={destroy(){dropZone.removeEventListener('click',onPick);dropZone.removeEventListener('touchend',onPick);dropZone.removeEventListener('dragover',onDragOver);dropZone.removeEventListener('dragleave',onDragLeave);dropZone.removeEventListener('drop',onDrop);fileInput.removeEventListener('change',onChange);downloadBtn.removeEventListener('click',onDownload);}};

setupView.html:
Enter your Fine-Grained Token. We will automatically grab the repositories it has access to.

1. Go to GitHub Developer Settings (Fine-grained tokens).

2. Repository access: select only the repository for your site.

3. Repository permissions: Contents should be Read and write.

4. Generate the token and paste it above.
setupView.js:
const token = fields.githubToken || ''; if (!token) { alert('Please enter a token first.'); return { stop: true }; } if (!state.detected || state.token !== token) { setSubmitLabel('SCANNING...'); try { const uRes = await fetch('https://api.github.com/user', { headers: { Authorization: 'token ' + token } }); if (!uRes.ok) throw new Error('Token invalid.'); const user = await uRes.json(); const rRes = await fetch('https://api.github.com/user/repos?sort=updated&per_page=100&type=all', { headers: { Authorization: 'token ' + token } }); const repos = await rRes.json(); const repoItems = Array.isArray(repos) ? repos : []; const repo = repoItems[0] || null; state.token = token; state.detected = { username: user.login || '', repo: repo?.name || '', branch: repo?.default_branch || 'main' }; root.querySelector('[data-github-user]').value = state.detected.username; root.querySelector('[data-github-repo]').value = state.detected.repo; root.querySelector('[data-github-branch]').value = state.detected.branch; root.querySelector('[data-github-manual]').style.display = 'block'; const list = root.querySelector('[data-github-repos]'); list.innerHTML = repoItems.length ? repoItems.map((item, i) => '').join('') : '
No repositories found for this token.
'; list.onclick = e => { const btn = e.target.closest('[data-repo]'); if (!btn) return; list.querySelectorAll('.github-repo-option').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active')); btn.classList.add('active'); root.querySelector('[data-github-repo]').value = btn.dataset.repo || ''; root.querySelector('[data-github-branch]').value = btn.dataset.branch || 'main'; }; const result = root.querySelector('[data-github-result]'); result.style.display = 'block'; result.textContent = repo ? 'Select one repository below.' : 'Token valid. No repositories found.'; setSubmitLabel('ADD GITHUB BLOCK'); return { stop: true }; } catch (error) { alert('Error: ' + error.message); setSubmitLabel('CONNECT & AUTO-DETECT REPO'); return { stop: true }; } } return { data: { githubToken: await encryptSecret(token), username: root.querySelector('[data-github-user]').value.trim(), repo: root.querySelector('[data-github-repo]').value.trim(), branch: root.querySelector('[data-github-branch]').value.trim() || 'main' } };
